# iTarock

**iTarock builds practical, privacy-aware digital infrastructure from Switzerland.**

This organization collects public projects, documentation and lab notes around:

- self-hosting;
- secure web publishing;
- home lab operations;
- networking flow mapping;
- automation;
- privacy-first services.

## Featured Project

[NicoLab](https://github.com/iTarock/NicoLab) is the public documentation hub for the iTarock home lab. It documents architecture, services, reverse proxy flows, security baseline and runbooks without exposing sensitive private details.

## Principles

- Keep systems understandable.
- Prefer secure defaults.
- Document operations, not only results.
- Publish useful knowledge without leaking private infrastructure.
